name: First Choice Transit Inc
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth corp search (not directly confirmed); third-party listings (Yelp/Chamber of Commerce/ZoomInfo) consistently show operating business at 101 Jackson St, Methuen, MA 01844 with secondary address 26 Ridgewood Cir, Lawrence, MA 01843
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate MA school-bus / pupil-transport operator). SAFER search for 'First Choice Transit' returned only an unrelated Columbus, OH carrier (USDOT 3219029) and a Miami FL 'First Choice Transportation Inc' (USDOT 1286795) — neither match Methuen, MA. Active small operator per Yelp (updated May 2026), ZoomInfo (5-9 employees, $1-5M revenue, Rail/Bus/Taxi). Methuen Public Schools' current contractor is NRT/Trombly (Beacon Mobility), suggesting First Choice serves other districts or charter/private routes. MA Secretary of the Commonwealth registry not directly verified in this session.

name: Anna's Mini-Bus Svc
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (file opened 2/8/2018; business start date 1/1/2002); Yellow Pages; Facebook business page
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for 'ANNAS MINI BUS', 'ANNA', and 'ANNA RODRIQUES' returned no records. Confirmed micro-operator: 1 employee, owner Anna Rodriques, operating in New Bedford South End since 1996 per Facebook (BBB lists incorporation/start as 2002). Serves school and daycare transportation. Address 501 S 2nd St, New Bedford, MA 02744-1817 matches input. Likely operates as DBA/sole prop without incorporation; MA SOC entity search not directly hit in this session.

name: Rader, Nellie M
entity_status: ceased operations (owner deceased 2/1/2021; retired from bus contracting 2008)
registry_source: Cumberland Times News obituary (2021); confirmed sole-proprietor school bus contractor for Allegany County Board of Education
notes: No USDOT (intrastate Allegany Co MD school-bus contractor). SAFER search for 'RADER' returned no matches. Per obituary, Nellie M. Rader (b. 6/12/1922, d. 2/1/2021, age 98) of Oldtown MD was a school bus contractor/driver for Allegany County Board of Education for 35+ years, ending 2008. Husband Melvin T. Rader (d. 2014) also of Oldtown. Business defunct since 2008; sole-prop with no separate corporate entity. Not a viable tuck-in target.

name: RKW Bus Driving Inc
entity_status: incorporated in Maryland (per D&B); SDAT not directly verified in this session
registry_source: D&B Business Directory (dandb.com) — RKW Bus Driving Inc, incorporated MD since 2008, 1 employee, ~$41K revenue, primary contact Raymond Ward
notes: No USDOT (intrastate Crisfield/Somerset County MD school bus contractor or driving school). SAFER searches for 'RKW BUS' and 'RKW' returned no matches. D&B classifies as 'Vehicle Driving School' but address at 2836 Byrdtown Rd, Crisfield, MD 21817 matches input. Micro-operator with 1 employee. Likely intrastate small bus contractor for Somerset Co Public Schools. SDAT entity status not verified in this session.

name: Wheelchair Transportation Svc
entity_status: unknown (likely defunct/unincorporated micro-operator at residential apartment address)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations searched via bizprofile.net and nycompanyregistry.com — the only 'Wheelchair Transportation Service Inc' on record (DOS ID 4947128, inc 2016-05-16, registered agent George Gao, principal Samuel Reyes) is at 34 Hillside Ave Apt 2u, Manhattan 10040 — DOES NOT match 343 E 74th St #17b, NY 10021
notes: No USDOT (SAFER search for 'WHEELCHAIR TRANSPORTATION' returned no matches). Target address 343 E 74th St #17b, NY 10021 is a residential apartment (The Forum condo building) — suggests historical home-based micro-operator likely no longer active. The active NY DOS-registered 'Wheelchair Transportation Service Inc' (2016, DOS ID 4947128) is at a different address (10040) and is a separate entity. Not a viable tuck-in target at the listed address. NYC paratransit/wheelchair NEMT market is dominated by larger licensed bases (Access-A-Ride contractors).
